target: 1. The Secret of the Hishigata Family
July 22nd
Alright, let's go…
Sorry, wait a second.
Hello… Alan!?

Sorry I didn't call you earlier. 
I just got back…

This time was really late.
I worried about you, Alan…
What happened this time?
Ah… nope…
Well, Karikiri-san talks a lot.
Oh right, that's true.

I was helped by him regarding the funeral…
He also worried about you too. 
Said he wanted to meet before returning to Tokyo.

Got it… I want to thank them too,
I was thinking of going to the shrine tomorrow…

You'll do that?
Is Mio here with you now?

Yeah! 
Right now they're all gathered at the Sou house…

Okay.
Tell Sou-kun my thanks too.

He tried to save Ushio until the end…
Sou seemed guilty, but I really appreciate it.

Yeah… I get that.
I'll be back soon, so talk later.

Dad?
He's alone at home, right? Is he okay?
Ah.

Since Alan has immunity,
No one can copy him or erase him…
So they shouldn't be able to mess with him recklessly.
Then I'll leave Mio in your care.

Ugh…
Don't let your guard down…

Ah, um… Shinpei-kun…
Um… Be careful.
Yeah…
The key's open…?!
…What happened to Ushio?
I'm fine! I don't feel anything right now!

That's strange…
There's no shadow presence…
Then where is mom?
Let's go inside.
What the…!?
Everything in the house is gone…!

How did it happen?
Tokiko…!

My brother's room and mine are empty too…
The desk, closet, bed - everything is gone.
Nagumo-sensei, this…?

…Hmm.
Fortunately, none of the people have bloodstains…
The things that were erased were household items.
They must have been embarrassed by something we saw…

Something that would embarrass us… 
That means there was some clue here.

Yeah…
Maybe we can find something from the traces.  
Let's check one of them?
(Where should I start…?)
Examine wall marks
Check the large floor mark
Look for small traces
Let's check the wall marks.

Well… there were paintings, calendars…
And pennants here too.

Probably only documents could be hidden…
I don't think they had any important clues.
What about the large floor mark?

That's a chest, this is a piano…
The biggest one would be the carpet.

They were all things we used every day,
But I don't see anything hidden.
What about these small marks around?

That's an indoor plant.
And that little one…

Probably fell from the shelf. 
Small items like souvenirs and trophies
Were displayed there.
None of them seem large enough to hide important things…
None of these are clues…?
But it seems like they just randomly erased everything.

They know something needs to be hidden,
but don't know where…
That's the impression I get.

It has to be Dad's doing!! 
That's the best proof that he isn't here…!!

Mom is gone too…
What happened?!
Shinpei… I feel the shadow's presence…!
You felt a shadow presence from inside the hospital, Ushio?
Y-yeah…
…Ushio, are you scared?

Of course I'm scared!! 
Hospitals at night really aren't my thing…
Quiet… something's coming.
What sound is that…?

Huh… there's something on the wall too.
It's dark, but I can't see clearly…
Examine the wall
Check the sound
This… is a bullet hole?

Hm…
There's signs of a struggle.
W-why do we have this here!?
Let me check what that sound was…
An elevator…!

It's not moving.
This noise is…
Something got stuck in the door on the lower floor…
Everyone, be careful. The shadow is down there…
We'll have to go downstairs then.

Yes… let's take the stairs. 
We need to check properly…
…What is down there?
The morgue.

There's a wheelchair stuck in the elevator. 
That must have been making that noise…

It's Mom's… wheelchair!!  
Why is it here…?
…Back!!

(A figure disappeared down the hallway…
Only a shadow could move that fast…)
…Did you see its face?
Nope.
In Ushio's original form…
(That shadow headed for… the morgue…)
…I'm going in.
Ah…
…There's nothing here…!
Ushio-san's body was here…
That shadow might have been after Ushio's corpse.

Yes…
If they scan the real thing, Ushio can recover.
They probably decided it wasn't wise to leave it until tomorrow's mealtime.
Damn…!

But…
They didn't have enough time to move the body, right?
It might still be hidden somewhere else.
We should check just in case…
(Where to start…)
Central bed
Wall door
Right shelf
The middle bed is…

There's nothing there to begin with.
Not much you could hide under the bed either.
Ushio-san's body was here.
What about the door on the wall?
It's a coffin storage space…
Empty inside…
What about the shelf on the right?
Alright, let's open it!
…Just medicines and documents.
Of course there wouldn't be any space for a body here…

…Yeah,
It seems like it was moved somewhere else after all…

If the shadow understands the hospital's structure
They could have taken the body in such a short time…
 /think
Kanago…?
Damn it!

Try again?  
Even if my hair's short,  
I can still pull your neck…

No… it's fine not to!  
I'll take care of things myself when the time comes.

…But right now we have to keep going!  
We need to find Sou's parents!!
Got it.
Tokiko, this corridor…?
It's the path leading to Hiruko Cave.

We bring food there…  
It's a different route from the old one in the infirmary.

I can feel a shadow's presence too…  
That one went deeper in from here, right?
Let's go!

It's close, everyone.  
They're right there… almost here…
Ah!
Haa… hah…
Mommy…?
(What's going on here?!?)

Don't shoot!  
Please… don't fire!!

But, Hishigata-sensei is!!!  
He's going to be killed by the father!!

It'll be okay, Sou!  
I'm gonna bring her back!!!
Ah… uh.
Dad!
…He's not breathing…

Switch!  
Do CPR!!

Dad!!! Don't die on me!!!  
If you just lie there and die, I'll never forgive ya!!  
No way am I letting that happen!!!!

Wake up!!  
You bastard dad!!!
…Hah! HAH!!
Geh, geh, geheh…
…Sou.

Stop hiding things already…  
You're my family, aren't you?

Haa… hah…  
Where's Chitose and Mom…?

Cut the link with Haine.  
She'll wake up soon enough.
…You're Ushio…
So you guys… made it this far?
That's why… Haine… I thought she'd talk to Chitose…

It's pointless hiding, Dad.  
Just scan and it'll be over anyway.

Tokiko…  
Kill them…!!
Dad!!!
If I do that… Haine will believe me again…
No, it won't work like that…

Everything was for Chitose's…  
For Mommy's sake!!
They don't have any intention of keeping the promise with Hishigata family.
Disappointed in you, Tokiko…

Get back, Sou!!  
The gun's too close to Hishigata-sensei!!!
(Oh no! Sou's got the gun…)

(Is he going to shoot?!?  
But it's Hishigata-sensei!!)
(No way I can make it in time!)
Tokiko!
Ushio, kill her!!
…What…?

…Hah.  
Heheh hehee…
You…! You're not Tokiko!!
Sorry, but no.
…Mio!!
…Do you believe me a little now?
Ah… Thank goodness.
Really?
If you doubt it, I can make a copy too.

That's absolutely not okay.
I don't even know what's in your heart…

You shot Tokiko!!
Why Dad?!
How could you… do something like that!!!
…Kill her.
Cough…

…Dad was a doctor, right?
Hey…? A doctor…
How could you say something like just killing people!! Hey!!!
You're not going to say anything?!

Enough already…
Mio, do it…
…Hmm…
What's wrong!?

It's impossible to copy…
This person has immunity.

I see…
Then I'll have no choice but to get you to talk, Hishigata-sensei…

…Wait…
That's impossible!
You can't copy me!?

You were once made into a shadow,
and that shadow is already dead.

People who have become like this develop immunity
so they can't be copied again.
…No way…That's crazy.

I'm already…
My shadow can't be made anymore…?
That's the case.
Hishigata-sensei…?

Chitose…
Then… what am I for…
Negoro-kun…

Hishigata-sensei, I'll be going now.
I've completed my top priority mission.
You… took Ayan's body…!

(Damn it, too far!
50m… out of range!!!)

Message from Shide-sama, Hishigata-sensei.
"Thank you very much for the kindness to the Hishigatas"

"But that's all over now."
"Thanks again."
That's what he said.
What!?!?

Oh, and a message for Ajiro Shinpei too.
"for some reason you're not dead yet"
"I'm fed up with your persistence."
"You can't do anything at all."

"One more day,"
"After that, everything will be over."
Then…
Wait! Hey!
Don't go!!!!
You don't need to chase…
But!!!

That guy is luring us with Ayan's body…
He specifically mentioned a time limit…
Setting times… provoking us.
If we fall for it, that'll be the end. We won't go.
But… but Shinpei!!!

I'm so angry!!!
The shadow I saw in the hallway earlier was him!!
He took Ayan's body!!!

Calm down, sister.
You're not the one who should be upset most…
It's Shinpei.

Let it go… just let yourself act…
it isn't something that can simply be fixed by…

Anger and frustration…
They become weapons when you release them.
Shinpei…
Hishigata… is there still a reason to stay silent?

Bring… the real…
Tokiko…
Have you woken up…

Hishigata.
Where are we!?
Chitose, can I talk to you for a moment?

Eh? Ayan???
Still dreaming…?
I don't have time to explain, so please look at my memories.
Ayan's memory?
…I'm sorry, Chitose…
(Windows' mother didn't know she was a shadow)

(She's been like this all along…
She was made to be that way…)
I understand… you're trying to stop the ritual…
But, is it really okay to kill Haine?
What do you mean?
If the shadow dies, its children and grandchildren will die too.

If you kill Haine… all shadows will die…!!
That means Ayan will also die!!!

There's no other way! There's just…no choice!! 
Otherwise, Mom…
Mom will die!!!

If Haine dies…
Then mom will also die…
(That's why… it was like that all along…!!)

Shinpei!! 
You knew this already, didn't you!?

I guess… I had a feeling…
Since the time when Toki told me about it in the fourth loop of Hiruko Cave.
…Ayan.

…It's true! It really is!
She was supposed to be dead two days ago!!

Living this long has been a miracle…
This moment feels like extra time!!!

If we can save everyone in that time,
I want to do it…!!!

Defeating Haine alone would solve everything!?
That's great news!! 
Then I'll gladly defeat Haine!!!
…Ku…
(That's right… I'm ashamed of myself for hesitating just now…)
Hey!
Yeah.

Hishigata,
What is Haine trying to do by coming back?

…She just wants…
to go home…
Go home…!?

Yes…
To the distant, deep sea beyond…
Her hometown…

No living being can reach there in this world.
Only shadows can go there.

Haine wants to take only the shadow back…
Those she chose as her family…
So… that's possible!?
It is, if her power returns.

That place… a country without time…
Me and Chitose were supposed to live there forever as shadows…!!

Windows, Tokiko too!
They should have become shadows eventually…!!!

So you can't just kill us!! 
What kind of selfishness is that!!!

You're an idiot!!!
For what reason!?

You really are so selfish… and self-centered…
There's no way to deal with you…

Thank you.
Thanks for helping me…
Chitose…
But it's time to end this now.

Windows, Tokiko,
I'm happy that I could see your growth…

Chitose! Wait!!!
If you die…!!
I… won't have any reason to live anymore…

No, there are children!
There people on the island who need…
<color=#GF_TIPS_026>you</color>
!!!

As Shinpei-kun said,
it's not over yet.
I can make up for it, starting now.

Guh… Ughh…!
Uhh… I'm gonna…, 
I can't breathe,  
UUOOOHHH…!!!
Father, here.
Yes…
What is this safe…!?
This is the hidden medical records I had Tokiko hide…

The diagnosis was all Capgras syndrome… 
But in reality, it's a list of people who were fed to Haine.
Shinpei-kun, your parents' names are also here…
Eh?

My father and mother… 
They were on a business trip when the ship sank…
…It was an accident…

They discovered Hiruko Cave, they wanted to announce it.  
That's why I had them killed, pretending it was an accident.

Shide did the killing,
and I replaced their bodies and sent them to Haine…
I'm sorry…

What!?
With just one sentence!!!

…The true identity of Shide…
You know about it, don't you…
…Yes.
Look at this photo…
(That's why… it was like that all along…!!)
Behold this photo…

He is Haine's guardian, 
and her first child.
His original name was <color=#GF_TIPS_025>Shidehiko Hishigata</color>.
He was the founder and first director of the Hishigata Clinic.
July 23rd
(The date changed to the 23rd)

(We were continuing our strategy meeting at Hishigata Clinic. 
Today… the things to do on this 7th cycle's 23rd day)

I won't be going back at all!! 
Someone who becomes alone during this time gets killed! 
I know that!!!
That's the first time anything other than a fart has come out of his butt, officer.

(Despite my worries about Alan,
Roz and Guildenstern went to Kofune, 
and they'll guard her all night)

Teacher… 
Why did Haine become like that?

14 years ago, when you were playing with me,
she looked like a cute girl. But…
That's right…

I was foolish. 
I shouldn't have gotten involved just out of curiosity.

This body I have… I think it was born from Haine.
When Ryunosuke-san died, 
the right eye that burst out of Haine became me.

I'm scared… 
The thing making my body and the one creating Haine are the same…
What if I become like Haine someday…
Take it easy.
When that time comes, I'll kill her…
Mio Kofune
Mio.

…What, it's me? 
What do you want?
You're really cold.

That's right… 
I hate myself a lot.
What, what is it!?!

My low nose, short fingers,
the hairiness and sweat-prone nature— 
all of them I hate.

Because they're all the opposite of my sister.
It's not just appearance, but grades and personality too…
Stop it!!

You're the shadow of my sister.
How long are you going to hold back?
At least tell your feelings to Shinpei.
If I keep being stubborn, I'll say it myself!
No way!!
…Absolutely no way!!!
Sou Hishigata
This is my mother's ashes.
There's no way I'd let Haine eat her!

Her birthday was January 3rd, 2013. 
The cause of death was heart failure…

…Was the donor's identity a lie?!
You were already dead that day of surgery, weren't you?!
Say it… about such an important thing.

The Hishigata family has been involved with Shadows for 300 years.
This secret must be passed down…

However, there's only one successor. 
My father didn't pass it to my brothers but just me alone.

I thought you'd find this too heavy… 
You value human life, don't you?
That's obviously true!!

…So I thought it was impossible. 
Sorry…
If you're going to apologize, do so to Tokiko!
Shinpei Ajiro

I don't know why… 
I just can't see Hishigata-sensei as a bad guy.
He probably didn't choose his methods to save someone important, right?

If I were in the same situation,
I don't think I'd do it either.

But that result was the resurrection ritual…
You participated in this mass murder!

By turning those who died into Shadows,
you erased their memories… and no one would find out.
My father's plan had something even beyond that, I think.
Yes…

Even a Shadow is still the sea, you know…
Chitose-san's Chitose too… 
Maybe I really can't be sure.

You're so kind…
Shinpei-san… when was the last time you slept?
Huh?

You've looped so many times…
Your consciousness is continuous, right?
That's terrible… your dark circles!

Yeah…
Maybe I've been awake this whole time.

See!!
If you push yourself too hard, it'll backfire!
Yeah…

Since everyone's here, 
please rest tonight.
(…Tokiko said it right—maybe this is the only time I can sleep)
Thank you…
Um, Shinpei-kun…

Ah! Koyumiba!
Sorry for dragging you into this mess.
By the way, after sunrise it'd be better to go back to your inn.
Leaving the room open for too long would look suspicious.

U-uh… 
It might be better to go back, I guess.

While you're dealing with such a big problem,
I can't do anything…

That's not true. 
If it weren't for Koyumiba's idea,
we wouldn't have won today.
Yeah…
If anything happens, please call me right away.

Even if I can't come immediately,
I'll do whatever it takes.

Yeah… okay. 
Thank you.

Shinpei! 
Tokiko said to prepare the bed, and I did!
Should I sing a lullaby if you can't sleep?

Stop it. 
That'll only make me more awake.

Oh! Right!
How about I sing a lullaby for Koyumiba? 
An idol's live song is super rare, you know?

You're crazy.
That would be disrespectful to Koyumiba.
Ah, I see… you really can't beat her.
What's that mean?
U-uh, nothing.
Is that so?

If I can do anything, please call me!
I'll definitely help!
Yeah… okay.

Hurry up and sleep before it's morning.
Goodnight!
Then, good night…
Well then, good night…
